narrative:
Boardman Local Sd (Mahoning) school district has 25,971 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.8% D−R vs +22.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
